mnemonics: CODE MAP: Choose Optimal Developer Expertise from Multiple Authoritative Publishers. (For remembering to use official docs, authoritative books, and trusted online courses from known experts.)
keyPoints: Prioritize official documentation and vendor-supplied resources for the most accurate and up-to-date information.
Supplement core topics with textbooks from established authors and recognized experts in software engineering and project management.
Utilize trusted online platforms (like Coursera, edX) for structured courses from reputable universities and industry leaders.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on unofficial blog posts or forum answers, which may be outdated, incorrect, or lack depth.
Choosing learning resources based on convenience or popularity rather than the authority and expertise of the source.
Failing to cross-reference information from multiple authoritative resources to get a well-rounded understanding.
